rationale: Grouped by agent after reviewing https://flywheeltechnologies.slack.com/archives/C02J2RJ6VSL/p1778522176115369. The thread identifies PermissionError [Errno 13] on Albertsons LiveRamp SFTP, notes Bifrost retries these failures, and confirms successful uploads were present; treat matching Albertsons LiveRamp alerts as one remediation path: monitor retries/uploads rather than investigate separate root causes.
